zh.lifeSummary: 當William Chesney於1163年出生在英國奧可福爾素斯 聶文頓時，他的父親Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington56歲，母親Denise Bereford70歲。他於大約1150年與Mrs Emma De Chesney在英國奧可福爾素斯 聶文頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1213年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Chesney于1163年出生在英国奧可福爾素斯 聶文頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington56岁，母亲Denise Bereford70岁。他于大约1150年与Mrs Emma De Chesney在英国奧可福爾素斯 聶文頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1213年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Chesney was born in 1163, in South Newington, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington, was 56 and his mother, Denise Bereford, was 70. He married Mrs Emma De Chesney about 1150, in South Newington, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1213, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Chesney est né en 1163, à South Newington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Denise Bereford, avait 70 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Emma De Chesney environ 1150, à South Newington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1213, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Chesney 1163 in South Newington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington 56 und seine Mutter Denise Bereford 70. Er hat um 1150 in South Newington, Oxfordshire, England Mrs Emma De Chesney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1213 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Chesney è nato il nel 1163 nel South Newington, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Denise Bereford, aveva 70 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Emma De Chesney circa 1150, nel South Newington, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1213, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Chesneyが1163年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアソウス ニューイントンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklingtonは56歳，母Denise Berefordは70歳であった。約1150年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアソウス ニューイントンでMrs Emma De Chesneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1213年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Chesney(이)가 1163년 영국 스퍼드실르 소우스 뉴잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Denise Bereford(은)는 70세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 스퍼드실르 소우스 뉴잉턴에서 Mrs Emma De Chesney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1213년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Chesney nasceu em 1163, em South Newington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Denise Bereford, tinha 70 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Emma De Chesney aproximadamente 1150, em South Newington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1213, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Chesney родился в 1163 г. в местности соут нюингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Denise Bereford, 70. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Emma De Chesney около 1150 г. в местности соут нюингтон, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1213 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Chesney nació en 1163, en South Newington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Chesney of Graffham & Ducklington, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Denise Bereford, tenía 70 años. Se casó con Mrs Emma De Chesney aproximadamente 1150, en South Newington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1213, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
